name: Ubuntu 24.04+ systemd-stub UKI baseline
description: Ubuntu 24.04 LTS `Noble Numbat' ships systemd 255+ with ukify(1) support. UKIs built via `ukify build' measure into PCR 11 (PE image) + PCR 12 (key=value EV_IPLs). Ubuntu's shipped 6.8 kernel uses CONFIG_SECURITY_LOCKDOWN_LSM=y with default `integrity' in Secure-Boot mode and CONFIG_IMA=y.
pcr-extension-order: pcr-12: EV_IPL key=value for each systemd-stub parameter
notes: Ubuntu's fips-validated variants enable CONFIG_FIPS=y; those are distinct UKIs and will have their own entry once onboarded. Azure-Ubuntu and GCP-Ubuntu are further variants with cloud-specific initramfs modules.
